chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD CP No. D- 3093 of 2018 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 09.08.2023 For orders on office objections For hearing of main case Mr. Muhammad Sachal R. Awan, Advocate for petitioners Mr. Muhammad Yousif Rahpoto, Asstt: A.G. This petition pertains to a notice issued under Sindh Public Property (Removal of Encroachment) Act 2010. This indulgence is being sought by the petitioners under Article 199 of the Constitution and he has failed to assist as to what justification he has to occupy the land / property in question. Nothing except that he is a citizen of Pakistan and to be dealt with in accordance with law, is stated. This indulgence is only for those he has approached the court with clean hands. Since the petitioners have not demonstrated any justification to occupy the land; no indulgence could be granted. Consequently, this petition is dismissed. Learned counsel at stage submits that he may be allowed to approach the civil court for the redressal of the grievance. In this regard we are of the view that no permission from this court is required, in case the cause has accrued. JUDGE JUDGE karar_hussain/PS*
